Anatta Nergui

← Collection

Hall Of Mirrors

Do you really want to speak —
The final truth

Can you even speak
Your own name
Or speak of what you see
Hear, touch, and feel —
And know that to be
True

What can you speak
Or say
That would be true
The final truth

Is there anything at all

I —

Even that — is that true
Or just a sound

Who designated
Gave this duty, burden, obligation —
This responsibility —
To this little creature
This little biped —

The authority to speak
The final —
Or any — truth

Nonsense
Vanity
Conceit

And yes — of course —
It gave itself
These obligations, duties
Responsibilities and designations

Who else

It
Gave itself the title
I

And called that —
The final truth

What else could it call
The final truth
But the title
It gave itself

I

And then —
It creates a God

And that —
It also calls I

But —

Think

What would you do

What possible option
Would you have —
Could you have —
But this —

If you
Found yourself
In

This situation —

Of being —
This
Biped

Or just
Being —

In

A hall of mirrors

Atmosphere
wryrueful
Crux
reflexivity
Words
181
Domain
identitytruth
Ground
epistemologicalconstructivist
